# Chapter 13: Robotics  (~140 pp)
- 13.1 Kinematics: forward and inverse (20) · 13.2 Dynamics (18) · 13.3 Trajectory planning (15) · 13.4 Sensing for robots: vision, lidar, force (20) · 13.5 Path planning (15) · 13.6 Manipulation and grasping (15) · 13.7 Mobile robotics: SLAM, navigation (15) · 13.8 Failure section: collisions, kinematic singularities, vision under adversarial conditions (22)

**Archetype**: control, interface, scaling. **Project**: build a small mobile robot; navigate a simple course autonomously. **Exercises**: 30.
